happy.text: Actually, I've still got a little time. If only there was a mall nearby. Oh look! There's one! Let's go shoosh-

excited.text: should I go with the blue heels or red flats I can't decide which would you

teasing.text: Are you trying to make a new friend? It couldn't be you're scared of him, because there's no surprises with this boy. I could take him out without even trying.

neutral.text: I was just toying with him, not trying to beat him. I didn't want the fun to be over that quickly.

sad.text: I was just learning about Gorton. It was all new to me, and terrifying. I don't know how long I would have survived on my own. The fact is, Dromas saved my life. He was strong. He made me feel safe. He taught me things. The other world made sense when I was with him. So I stayed with him. And trusted him. And all the while he was luring me into his web of lies.

warm.text: Yeah! I'll assign each of you a position, east, west, north, and south of town. I get to be the one in charge of the operation, because after all, it was my idea!

desperate.text: Wait, I haven't officially wished yet. My wish is that we all start over from scratch, and you give us a new mission over what-

touched.text: A four leaf clover? So you were here, right here all this time, looking for one of these to give to me?

lecturing.text: The nights on the white cage is sitting there at that museum doesn't seem fair that we have to go searching all over the place
lecturing.descriptor: lecturing, talking down to someone she considers beneath her

angry_hi2.text: Makes life a lot more fun.

laugh2.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

happy_long.text: Benny Benny Benny you're such a troublemaker you should be ashamed of yourself messing with poor girl like that and as if that wasn't bad enough it's nothing compared to this just think of all the trouble you could cause unleashing the power of the Tenkai fortress disrupting the cosmic balance ending life on earth as we know it destroying the Tenkai Knights

belittling.text: your idea of a friend, Gurren. I guess it's no wonder you're such a hopeless loser.

assertive.text: honestly what are you gonna grow up friends are boring and anyone who thinks they are

angry_low.text: because I don't want one what's so great about them anyway friends tie you down and hold you back they're just one more hassle that gets in your way and you needs that

angry_laugh.text: Oh really? Is that what you think? Hahaha! Just wait! One day your friends are gonna get in your way! Then you'll be sorry you had them!
angry_laugh.descriptor: angry, laughing mid-way to cover it

angry.text: What? You expect me to jump up and down and kiss you or something?

flustered.text: None of your business why I'm here. Just leave me alone.
